_comment: Bad case 22 — Whisper transcribed 'cleared for takeoff' as 'Clear for take of runway 06' (one f missing on takeoff, leading word 'Clear' instead of 'Cleared'). Before the fix the rule-based intent_parser matched RUNWAY_VACATED at confidence 0.90 because match_runway_vacated checked '!takeoff && !take off' which both missed 'take of'. Then DEPARTURE_CLEARED state had no RUNWAY_VACATED handler so the _INVALID template fired with 'read back takeoff clearance' even though the pilot HAD just read it back. Fix: match_readback now also accepts 'take of' as a Whisper variant, and match_runway_vacated rejects any 'for take ...' phrase.
name: Bad case 22 — Whisper takeoff readback 'take of' must classify as READBACK, not RUNWAY_VACATED

say.note: Step 1 — VFR cross-country ready for departure on Tower freq
say.text: Tower Hotel Bravo Delta Charlie Hotel runway 06 ready for departure on course

say.note: Step 2 — Whisper-mistranscribed takeoff readback. Must classify as READBACK (silent reply), state stays DEPARTURE_CLEARED. Critical: NOT RUNWAY_VACATED, NOT _INVALID with 'read back takeoff clearance'.
say.text: Clear for take of runway 06 Charlie Hotel
